message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 242 snapshot mark_shutdown + undo executor cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Additional cross-crate surface migration. 2 more sites:

1. L15608 snapshot engine shutdown path:
   `engine.mark_shutdown_with_cx(&shutdown_cx)`
   Routes through SnapshotEngine::mark_shutdown_with_cx (tick 204 —
   reads session_id via read_with_cx + runs mark_shutdown_sync on
   spawn_blocking pool).

2. L28532 undo executor dispatch loop:
   `executor.execute_with_cx(&undo_cx, request)`
   Routes through undo.rs UndoExecutor::execute_with_cx — cx-first
   path through get_action_history_with_cx, get_action_undo_with_cx,
   and strategy dispatch to execute_workflow_abort_with_cx /
   execute_pane_close_with_cx.

Uses distinct `shutdown_cx` and `undo_cx` bindings for clarity.

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

## main.rs surface migration summary through tick 242

| Surface | Sites | Ticks |
|---------|-------|-------|
| WorkflowRunner | 6 | 224/226 |
| NotificationPipeline | 1 | 225 |
| IpcClient | 7 | 227/228 |
| CassClient | 3 | 227/229 |
| WeztermInterface | 28 | 230-234 |
| StorageHandle reads | 11 | 235-236 |
| StorageHandle writes | 25 | 237-241 |
| SnapshotEngine | 1 | 242 |
| UndoExecutor | 1 | 242 |
| **Total** | **83** | 224-242 |

56 ticks this session (187-242).
